channel.title: Frontity release: new Twenty Nineteen Frontity theme + CodeSandbox support
channel.description:
- The **Twenty Nineteen** WordPress theme has been ported over to Frontity and it is now available as a [free Frontity theme](https://github.com/imranhsayed/frontity-twentynineteen). More information [here](https://blog.frontity.org/introducing-twenty-nineteen-frontity-theme/). Thanks to [Smit Patadiya](https://github.com/smit-patadiya) and [Imran Sayed](https://github.com/imranhsayed).
- We have added **support for CodeSandbox** so you can try Frontity directly from your browser without having to install anything: https://codesandbox.io/s/github/frontity/codesandbox-frontity. Thanks to [Luis Herranz](https://github.com/luisherranz).

item.title: Frontity release: new Twenty Nineteen Frontity theme + CodeSandbox support
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
• The Twenty Nineteen WordPress theme has been ported over to Frontity and it is now available as a free Frontity theme. More information here. Thanks to Smit Patadiya and Imran Sayed.

  • We have added support for CodeSandbox so you can try Frontity directly from your browser without having to install anything: https://codesandbox.io/s/github/frontity/codesandbox-frontity. Thanks to Luis Herranz.

Read full topic
item.source: Frontity release: new Twenty Nineteen Frontity theme + CodeSandbox support
